utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 of these items. Each one appears to be fully specified with detailed information: property includes type, price, size, location, taxes, fees, and features; financing includes all main terms and documentation requirements; legal_services includes name, cost, and currency; moving_services includes service level, cost, currency, and packing detail; setup_services includes type, cost, currency, and services included; total_budget includes a detailed cost breakdown and computed total. Although there is an additional 'property_survey' field, that does not affect the completeness of the required items. Therefore, all 6 out of 6 required items are fully covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution describes a purchase property worth CAD 480,000, size 95 sqm, with smart_home and energy_efficient features — these details match the 'New Build' property in the ground-truth list (rating 10).
